title: Product Prototype and Visual Direction
objective: 以 Maggie Appleton 的知识花园阅读体验和 Amelia Wattenberger 的科学可视化气质为参照，完成 Personal Knowledge Asset OS 的用户端与管理端纯前端原型、信息架构和视觉系统定义

tasks.title: Define visual direction and design tokens
acceptance_criteria: Document explains how Maggie Appleton and Amelia Wattenberger are translated into this product without copying assets
Design tokens cover color, typography, layout density, illustration style and graph visualization mood
User-facing and admin-facing visual rules are clearly separated
tasks.notes: This sprint is prototype-only and must not introduce backend API or deployment side effects.

tasks.title: Prototype public landing page
acceptance_criteria: Landing page presents identity, knowledge garden, portfolio, timeline and graph entry in the first browsing path
The page feels like a reading-oriented knowledge atlas rather than a generic portfolio landing page
No decorative-only visual treatment overrides content clarity
tasks.notes: Use static data already available in public/assets and content.

tasks.title: Prototype note reading surface
acceptance_criteria: Notes surface supports reading hierarchy, tags, timestamps and source provenance
Draft and private content remain excluded from public surfaces
Design includes space for future backlinks, table of contents and related notes
tasks.notes: Do not expose private Obsidian content beyond current publish filters.

tasks.title: Prototype library timeline and portfolio surfaces
acceptance_criteria: Library surface organizes notes, projects, decks and resume as one knowledge asset system
Portfolio and timeline affordances are represented in the frontend prototype
The prototype makes future filtering and chronology features obvious without requiring backend work
tasks.notes: Keep the first implementation static and build-time driven.

tasks.title: Prototype semantic graph visual upgrade
acceptance_criteria: Graph view improves scanning, clustering cues and scientific visualization feel
Large graph performance remains acceptable for the current Obsidian-scale dataset
The design leaves a clear path toward future 3D or richer interaction without implementing it prematurely
tasks.notes: 3D remains gated by lab-input-policy unless explicitly approved later.

tasks.title: Prototype local admin console shell
acceptance_criteria: Admin shell shows source tree, preview panel, publish queue and quality gate placeholders
Prototype clearly communicates that admin is local-first and not intended for public exposure by default
No write action, GitHub token, deployment trigger or external mutation is implemented in this sprint
tasks.notes: This is a clickable or static prototype shell only.
